narrative:
Sandy Township has 1,804 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
